EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is widely cited as co-authored by Junzhe Zhang and Elias Bareinboim in the proceedings of the 2020 International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML). The author count mismatch noted by the automated checker is due to incomplete indexing in some databases, but the paper itself and the authorship are correctly attributed to both individuals in the official proceedings and on the authors' own websites.

LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v119/zhang20a.html
FOUND_TITLE: Designing Optimal Dynamic Treatment Regimes: A Causal Reinforcement Learning Approach
FOUND_AUTHORS: Junzhe Zhang, Elias Bareinboim
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
